response: Founded in 1861, the Massachusetts Institute of Technology (MIT) is currently ranked the #1 university in the world, enrolling approximately 11,500 students and employing 1,069 faculty members. With an exceptionally competitive acceptance rate of just 3.9% and an annual tuition of $57,590, MIT boasts a massive endowment of $24.6 billion to support its world-class programs. The institution has an extraordinary legacy of academic excellence, with 98 Nobel laureates affiliated with the university throughout its history.
